subcodes.first_line: O righteous friends! The darkness of ignorance and error had enveloped the contingent realm and straitened the wide expanse of existence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان راستان ظلمات جهل و ضلال عرصه امکانرا احاطه نموده بود و فسحت وجود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
